title: glochidion lativenium
intro: Glochidion lativenium, also known as the Red Bristle or Red-flowered Glochidion, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Glochidion lativenium include the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues, as well as the potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically as a paste to aid in wound healing.
